summary: Section filtering feature testing completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 10/10 test scenarios passed (100%). All features working perfectly - questions filtered by section (mental=12, math=0, gujarati=0), Coming Soon UI displays correctly for empty sections.
critical_code_review_comments: Section filtering implemented correctly in backend: GET /api/questions/{subject}?section={section_id}
All 12 JVN questions correctly tagged with section='mental' in database
Frontend correctly passes sectionId query parameter when fetching questions
Coming Soon UI displays correctly for sections with 0 questions (math and gujarati)
All 3 sections (mental, math, gujarati) are clickable with chevron arrows
Questions list correctly shows filtered results based on section
Select All button works correctly with all 12 mental ability questions
PDF generation still works with selected questions
Navigation flow: Dashboard → JVN Subject → Section → Questions works perfectly
Login, dashboard 2x2 grid, and all existing features remain working
seed_data_creation: Using existing 12 JVN questions with section='mental' from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Section filtering feature fully implemented and working. Backend filters questions by section query parameter. Frontend displays Coming Soon message for empty sections. All 12 JVN questions are in mental ability section. Math and Gujarati sections have 0 questions and show Coming Soon UI as expected.

tests: ✓ GET /api/questions/JVN?section=mental returns 12 questions
✓ GET /api/questions/JVN?section=math returns empty array (0 questions)
✓ GET /api/questions/JVN?section=gujarati returns empty array (0 questions)
✓ GET /api/questions/JVN (no section param) returns all 12 questions
✓ Section filtering is case-sensitive (lowercase 'mental' works)
✓ Invalid section name returns empty array (no error)
✓ All JVN questions have section field
✓ Section distribution verified: 12 mental, 0 math, 0 gujarati
✓ Login works with admin/Admin@123
✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN returns valid PDF
✓ GET /api/subjects returns 6 subjects
✓ Login page: admin/Admin@123 credentials work
✓ Dashboard: 2x2 grid shows all 6 subjects (JVN with Active badge, CET, PSE, NMMS, GSSE, TST)
✓ JVN subject page: Shows 3 sections (mental, math, gujarati) all visible
✓ JVN subject page: All 3 sections are clickable with chevron arrows on right
✓ JVN > Mental Ability Test: Shows all 12 questions in list view
✓ JVN > Mental Ability Test: Each question has checkbox for selection
✓ JVN > Mental Ability Test: Select All button works, updates to 'Deselect All' after clicking
✓ JVN > Mental Ability Test: PDF button shows 'Convert to PDF (12 Questions)' when all selected
✓ JVN > Mathematical Test: Shows 'Coming Soon!' message (0 questions)
✓ JVN > Gujarati Test: Shows 'Coming Soon!' message (0 questions)

ui_behavior.mental_section: Shows 12 questions list with checkboxes and Select All functionality
ui_behavior.math_section: Shows 'Coming Soon!' message with info icon and descriptive text
ui_behavior.gujarati_section: Shows 'Coming Soon!' message with info icon and descriptive text

feature_highlights.section_filtering: Backend API correctly filters questions by section query parameter

feature_highlights.data_consistency: All 12 JVN questions properly tagged with section='mental' in database
feature_highlights.backward_compatibility: All existing features (login, dashboard, PDF generation) remain working
feature_highlights.user_experience: Clear navigation flow from dashboard → subject → section → questions
